headline: AUM Growth Likely to Aid Ameriprise's Q1 Earnings Despite Cost Woes
summary: AMP's rising AUM and fee growth may lift Q1 results, even as higher tech and hiring costs weigh on margins.

headline: Morgan Stanley Turns Bearish on Ameriprise (AMP), KBW Takes More Balanced View
summary: Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE:AMP) is included among the 12 High Dividend Stocks Picked by Billionaire Ray Dalio. On April 10, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on Ameriprise Financial, Inc. (NYSE:AMP) to $452 from $485. It reiterated an Underweight rating on the shares. The firm expects Q1 earnings for brokers and exchanges to come in […]
